requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and INDOCAL / NORDOM Evidence

summary.en: INDOCAL is the Dominican Republic national quality, standardization, conformity assessment, and metrology institution, and it links Dominican NORDOM standards activity with international bodies including IEC. For EVSE, IEC 61851-1 is the international safety baseline for conductive charging systems, and IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV charging stations. Exporters should prepare clause-level IEC safety evidence, Spanish installation instructions, protective-device ratings, enclosure protection, thermal operation data for Caribbean outdoor conditions, and any INDOCAL / NORDOM conformity documents required for the import or project route.
summary.zh: INDOCAL是多米尼加共和国国家质量、标准化、合格评定和计量机构，并将多米尼加NORDOM标准活动与IEC等国际组织衔接。对于EVSE，IEC 61851-1是传导充电系统的国际安全基线，IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站。出口商应准备IEC安全逐条证据、西班牙语安装说明、保护器件额定值、外壳防护、针对加勒比户外条件的热运行数据，以及进口或项目路径所需的任何INDOCAL / NORDOM合格文件。
summary.zht: INDOCAL是多明尼加共和國國家品質、標準化、合格評定和計量機構，並將多明尼加NORDOM標準活動與IEC等國際組織銜接。對於EVSE，IEC 61851-1是傳導充電系統的國際安全基線，IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站。出口商應準備IEC安全逐條證據、西班牙語安裝說明、保護器件額定值、外殼防護、針對加勒比戶外條件的熱運行數據，以及進口或項目路徑所需的任何INDOCAL / NORDOM合格文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
INDOCAL / NORDOM conformity assessment and standards route where applicable

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930 DC communication. GB/T evidence may help build a clause matrix, but it contains China-specific connector and communication assumptions and should not be presented as direct IEC 61851 or Dominican Republic conformity evidence without a gap assessment and accepted test reports.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930直流通信支撑。GB/T证据可帮助建立逐条矩阵，但其包含中国特有接口和通信假设，若未完成差距评估并取得认可测试报告，不应作为IEC 61851或多米尼加共和国合格证据直接提交。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930直流通訊支撐。GB/T證據可幫助建立逐條矩陣，但其包含中國特有接口和通訊假設，若未完成差距評估並取得認可測試報告，不應作為IEC 61851或多明尼加共和國合格證據直接提交。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 evidence from an accepted laboratory, protection and fault-response documentation, enclosure IP test data, corrosion and outdoor environmental suitability information, Spanish labels/manuals, and a clause-level map explaining how China GB/T evidence was converted or retested. INDOCAL conformity scope and NORDOM adoption should be verified for the product category and HS code before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备认可实验室出具的IEC 61851-1及IEC 61851-23证据、保护及故障响应文件、外壳IP测试数据、防腐蚀及户外环境适用性信息、西班牙语标签/手册，以及说明中国GB/T证据如何转换或重新测试的逐条映射。出货前应按产品类别和HS编码核实INDOCAL合格评定范围及NORDOM采标情况。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備認可實驗室出具的IEC 61851-1及IEC 61851-23證據、保護及故障響應文件、外殼IP測試數據、防腐蝕及戶外環境適用性資訊、西班牙語標籤/手冊，以及說明中國GB/T證據如何轉換或重新測試的逐條映射。出貨前應按產品類別和HS編碼核實INDOCAL合格評定範圍及NORDOM採標情況。

mandatory_status.target: Likely required by project or conformity route — confirm INDOCAL / NORDOM scope, product category, HS code, and project specification before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.1 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence without a gap assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Dominican Republic-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, DC-specific IEC 61851-23 evidence where applicable, environmental suitability for Caribbean outdoor sites, and a verified INDOCAL / NORDOM conformity path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向多米尼加共和国的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据、适用时的IEC 61851-23直流证据、针对加勒比户外站点的环境适用性，以及经核实的INDOCAL / NORDOM合格路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向多明尼加共和國的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據、適用時的IEC 61851-23直流證據、針對加勒比戶外站點的環境適用性，以及經核實的INDOCAL / NORDOM合格路徑。
